contexts.context: 10.  In Corneille's Horace, <mark>Curiace</mark> is one of the Alban warrior triplets and fiancé...
...Camille, sister of the Roman warrior Horace. <mark>Curiace</mark> is revealed to have been vanquished by Horace along...
...engaged to Curiatius, the counterpart of Corneille's <mark>Curiace</mark>. Back
